name: ai-pilot-chat-exporter
description: Standalone Chrome MV3 extension that exports AI chat conversations to Markdown / HTML / PDF / JSON / ZIP.

scripts.safari: node -e "if (process.platform !== 'darwin') { console.error('Safari conversion requires macOS + Xcode.'); process.exit(1); }" && xcrun safari-web-extension-converter dist/ --app-name "AI-Pilot Chat Exporter" --bundle-identifier com.iamjairo.aipilot.chatexporter
